# broodwar.live

> The community platform for StarCraft: Brood War competitive play.

broodwar.live is a free, open-source reference site for the StarCraft: Brood War competitive community. It provides player stats, match histories, replay analysis, build order databases, live stream tracking, tournament records, and a comprehensive game wiki.

## Sections

- [Players](https://broodwar.live/players): Pro player profiles, career stats, Elo ratings, head-to-head records
- [Matches](https://broodwar.live/matches): Competitive match results with scores, maps, and tournaments
- [Tournaments](https://broodwar.live/tournaments): ASL, BSL, and other tournament series with season histories
- [Replays](https://broodwar.live/replays): Upload .rep files for instant build order breakdowns and APM analysis
- [Builds](https://broodwar.live/builds): Structured build order database backed by pro replay evidence
- [Streams](https://broodwar.live/streams): Live Korean and international Brood War streams
- [Balance](https://broodwar.live/balance): Matchup winrate analytics by map, era, and skill bracket
- [Wiki](https://broodwar.live/wiki): Game reference — races, units, buildings, abilities, maps

## Wiki Coverage

- [Races](https://broodwar.live/wiki/races): Terran, Protoss, Zerg — playstyle, strengths, weaknesses
- [Units](https://broodwar.live/wiki/units): All units with stats (minerals, gas, supply, HP, armor, damage)
- [Buildings](https://broodwar.live/wiki/buildings): All structures with stats and production info
- [Abilities](https://broodwar.live/wiki/abilities): Special abilities with energy costs and caster info
- [Maps](https://broodwar.live/wiki/maps): Competitive maps with dimensions, tileset, spawn positions

## Languages

Content is available in English and Korean (한국어).

## API

A JSON API is available at https://api.broodwar.live for programmatic access to player, match, replay, stream, and balance data.

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://broodwar.live/llms-full.txt): Extended reference with content structure details
- [Source Code](https://github.com/broodwar-live): Open-source on GitHub
